Knowledge for the internet.  He's the Brazilian Tony Stark.   That 's the point; with millions of people reached, their mission is simple: to unite science and innovation to change businesses and people. Breno has already amassed over 500 million impressions on social media and more than 400,000 followers organically.   He also founded companies and startups that together have amassed over 200,000 followers across various sectors.  His experience includes consulting for multinational companies and leading the digital division of a Canadian giant in Vancouver.  All this with an innovative and disruptive language that connects strategy, social impact, and sustainability as an engine for growth. Companies that applied their methods grew.  Those who followed their organic content scaled up.  Multinational companies that listened to their ideas changed the course of their brands.  All this with lightness, good humor, and authentic communication.  If you're looking for more than just a lecture, if you want an experience that will transform your team and generate real results, you need to meet Bren Fister.  This is the moment.
